misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: advertisements for Utah Power & Light Co., Deseret Federal Savings & Loan, O.P. Skaggs System grocery stores, Crystal Palace Markets, Granite Furniture Co., Peerless Laundry, Brigham Young University Alpine Summer Term, Fisher's Vitamin D Bread, Acousticon hearing aids, General Board Relief Society clothing, and Deseret Book Company study books. Also includes the magazine's table of contents for July 1937 issue and publication/subscription information. All content is appropriate miscellaneous material rather than standalone articles.
